What we do

Complete construction services

From a single extension to a full new build, we handle every stage in-house with the same standard of finish.

New Builds

Bespoke homes built from the ground up.

Extensions

Single & double-storey extensions.

Renovations

Full refurbishments & remodels.

Stonework & Masonry

Traditional stone & brickwork.

Roofing

New roofs, repairs & re-slating.

Loft Conversions

Extra space without moving home.

Kitchens & Bathrooms

Design, supply & full fit-out.

Landscaping & Driveways

Patios, paving & groundworks.

The transformation

Before & after

Watch the transformation — the difference quality construction makes.

New build · Derbyshire

Detached Country New Build

Built from the foundations up on a countryside plot — a substantial detached family home in traditional stone and brick beneath a natural slate roof, finished with landscaped grounds and a sweeping gravel driveway.

Conversion & extension · Derbyshire

Stone Barn Conversion & Extension

A redundant stone barn reimagined as a contemporary home — full structural renovation, a single-storey garden extension with frameless sliding glazing, and beautifully landscaped patio gardens.

About

A hands-on, family-run business

Construction Derbyshire was founded on a simple idea: build to the standard we'd want in our own homes. With years of experience across new builds, extensions and renovations, we treat every project as if it were our own.

From your first phone call to the final handover, you'll deal directly with the people doing the work — no call centres, no middlemen, just honest advice and a job done properly.

[Owner name]
